entry.title: New: Bill 134 (2025) (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
"A BILL FOR AN ORDINANCE AMENDING THE FISCAL YEAR 2026 BUDGET, EMERGENCY MANAGEMENT AGENCY, EMERGENCY MANAGEMENT PROGRAM, DECREASE CATEGORY B BY $450,000, AND ADD NEW APPROPRIATIONS FOR LIVING PONO PROJECT IN THE AMOUNT OF $250,000, AND HANA BUSINESS COUNCIL, INC. IN THE AMOUNT OF $200,000"

Council of the County of Maui

View on the council site
